name: eruto-skills
description: Claude Code skills for research, presentations, and creative writing

plugins.name: research-note
plugins.description: Research any topic from web, YouTube transcripts, PDFs, X/Twitter posts, or GitHub repos, then generate a footnoted Markdown note with an optional Mermaid mindmap. Includes source-quality tiers and headless-Chrome fetching.

plugins.name: marp
plugins.description: Create, edit, and manage Marp (Markdown) presentation slides. Five modes (create/edit/theme/convert/read) with a design-first approach, layout pattern library, and 60-30-10 color system.

plugins.name: nanj-thread
plugins.description: Generate a Japanese anonymous-forum (なんJ / 2ch / 5ch) style thread where fictitious commenters observe and riff on the user, a project, or a given topic. For creative-writing and parody use.

plugins.name: analyze-video
plugins.description: Analyze a YouTube reference video's structure and rhetorical techniques. Fetches metadata and subtitles via yt-dlp, then extracts macro/micro structure, hooks, pacing, hedging language, persuasion patterns, retention tactics, and memorable phrases as a Markdown report. Compare two videos via --compare.
